_README: FINAL reconciled facts — japanforamericans (Japan, US audience). THIS is the file content creation reads — never the individual AI files. Sources: claude, gemini, chatgpt, grok, deepseek (5). STATUS: verified = confirmed against an official source (URL+date); agreed_stable = stable, sources agree, no flag; serve_live = volatile, never frozen; disputed = sources differed (resolved + dissent noted). Recommendations: core = named by most/all, optional = fewer. HUMAN ACTION: see _human_checklist (max 5, ranked, no padding).

_reconciliation_summary.result: Strong 5-source convergence, ZERO factual conflicts. All change-prone facts agree: US visa-free 90 days, no fee, no mandatory ETA, Visit Japan Web OPTIONAL (all 5 correct this run), advisory Level 1, tap water safe. Recommendation consensus strong (Kinkaku-ji 5/5; Shibuya Crossing, Senso-ji, teamLab, Arashiyama, Kiyomizu top of pool).

source_quality.gemini: complete but OFF-TEMPLATE (renamed sections: visa_entry/money_finance/etc) — content mapped back by hand
source_quality.chatgpt: complete; file used smart/curly quotes (repaired to valid JSON)
source_quality.grok: complete, on-template, valid; got Visit Japan Web right this run
source_quality.deepseek: complete, on-template, valid; was mislabeled ai_source=claude (corrected)

online_authorization_required.value: No mandatory ETA for US visa-free entry as of 2026. Visit Japan Web (vjw.digital.go.jp) is OPTIONAL pre-registration for immigration+customs (one 2D QR code; 2026 Joint Kiosks at HND/NRT/KIX). A digital travel authorization for visa-exempt travelers is reportedly planned for 2028 — NOT active yet.
online_authorization_required.note: All 5 sources agreed optional this run.

value: unofficial visa/eVisa sites charging fees for free visa-free entry
third-party sites charging for the free Visit Japan Web QR

passport_validity_required.value: Valid for duration of stay (no 6-month rule for US visa-free visitors) — confirm

onward_ticket_required.value: Return/onward ticket may be requested at entry

cash_vs_card.value: Cards accepted in cities/tourist spots; cash still important for small shops, temples, rural. IC cards (Suica/Pasmo) essential for transit.

atm_availability.value: 7-Eleven and Japan Post ATMs reliably take foreign cards

tipping_norm.value: No tipping — not customary, service included

flight_from_us.value: Nonstop from LAX/SFO/SEA/ORD/JFK-EWR/DFW/IAD; West Coast ~11-12h, East Coast ~13-14h. Prices serve-live.

intercity_rail.value: JR Shinkansen (bullet train); Japan Rail Pass cost-effective for tourists; Tokyo↔Kyoto ~2h15-2h30

buses.value: Reliable long-distance + local buses; cheaper than rail, slower

domestic_flights.value: Efficient for long distances; LCCs (Peach, Jetstar Japan) available

ride_sharing.value: Uber available in big cities but mostly hails taxis; limited vs US; taxis safe but expensive

car_rental_and_driving.value: Rarely needed (rail-centric). Drives on LEFT; International Driving Permit required with US license; strict 0.03% BAC; city parking expensive

climate_by_season.value: Spring (Mar-May) mild + cherry blossoms; summer (Jun-Aug) hot/humid + rainy season/typhoon; fall (Sep-Nov) mild + autumn colors; winter (Dec-Feb) cold, snow in north

advisory_level.value: US State Dept Level 1 — Exercise Normal Precautions

main_risk.value: Environmental (earthquakes, typhoons), NOT crime. Very low-crime country.

vaccines.value: No mandatory vaccines for entry; routine recommended (MMR, Hep A/B, flu)

value: rare overall; bar/taxi overcharging in nightlife districts (Kabukicho/Roppongi); fake tour guides near stations

sim_esim.value: eSIM easy (Airalo/Ubigi); tourist SIM (Docomo/SoftBank) and pocket WiFi at airports

dress_norms.value: No strict code; conservative at temples/shrines; remove shoes indoors/ryokan

getting_there.value: Narita (NRT) ~60-90min to center via N'EX/Skyliner; Haneda (HND) ~30min via monorail/Keikyu (closer)

local_transport.value: JR Yamanote loop + Tokyo Metro; Suica/Pasmo IC card

top_sights.note: Senso-ji, Shibuya, teamLab top the 5-source pool

local_transport.value: buses + subway + walking in central areas; IC card works

nearest_airport.value: Osaka Kansai (KIX) or Itami (ITM); no own major airport

itineraries.title: Japan in 7 days (first-timer, Tokyo + Kyoto)

common_spine.note: Structure all 5 sources converged on — high-confidence core.
value: Days 1-3: Tokyo (arrival + Shibuya/Shinjuku; Asakusa/Senso-ji + Akihabara/Skytree; teamLab; a day trip — Hakone or Nikko)
Days 5-6: Kyoto (Fushimi Inari, Kiyomizu/Higashiyama; Arashiyama + Kinkaku-ji)
Day 7: Nara day trip or final Kyoto sights, depart via Kansai (KIX)

variations_offered: Day-3 Tokyo: Hakone vs Nikko vs city day
Kyoto: add Nijo Castle / Imperial Palace / Philosopher's Path
itineraries.assumptions: moderate pace, spring/autumn, first-time US visitor, rail-based (JR Pass for the Tokyo↔Kyoto leg)

_human_checklist._rule: Max 5, ranked, no padding. Everything else is settled (verified or agreed_stable across 5 sources).
items: 1. (LOW URGENCY) Visit Japan Web — re-confirm OPTIONAL (not required) at publish time; the entry detail most likely to change. Source: vjw.digital.go.jp.
2. (WATCH) 2028 planned digital travel authorization — confirm NOT live early before publishing entry articles.
3. (IF RELEVANT) Tax-free shopping shift to refund-at-departure (~Nov 2026) — only matters if an article covers shopping.
4. (IF RELEVANT) Driving article only: confirm IDP requirement + current BAC.
5. (NONE beyond above) — visa, advisory, currency, emergency numbers, tap water all 5-source agreed + source-verified.
